# netbox_racks (Data Source)

Fetches a list of racks from Netbox.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all racks.
data "netbox_racks" "all" {}

# Output the name of the first rack, or a message if no racks are found.
output "first_rack_name" {
  value = length(data.netbox_racks.all.racks) > 0 ? data.netbox_racks.all.racks[0].name : "No racks found"
}

# Output the total number of racks found.
output "rack_count" {
  value = length(data.netbox_racks.all.racks)
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Placeholder identifier for the data source.
- `racks` (Attributes List) List of racks. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--racks))

<a id="nestedatt--racks"></a>
### Nested Schema for `racks`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) Description for the rack.
- `facility_id` (String) A field used to identify the rack by a facility-specific identifier.
- `id` (Number) The numeric ID of the rack.
- `location_id` (Number) The ID of the location within the site.
- `name` (String) The name of the rack.
- `role_id` (Number) The ID of the rack role.
- `site_id` (Number) The ID of the site where the rack is located.
- `status` (String) The status of the rack.
- `u_height` (Number) Height in rack units.
